meaning: adj.因地球自转而引起的,[气]地转风的
examples: Geostrophic adjustment is an important process in the atmosphere.
A simple LB model is present to numerically solve the quasi-geostrophic barotropic equivalent vorticity equation at first.
Based on an invariant of semi-potential vorticity, the scale criterion of geostrophic adaptation in tropical baroclinic atmosphere is discussed.
